text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is in my office, ostensibly with some sort
of request.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this, Trainer. I only slept for four hours
last night!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I was up workin' on my arms, and then it just got
so late.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, four hours might not be enough for some,
but it's more than enough for me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh! That wasn't 'cause I'm sleepy or anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, Vodka has been staying up late
in order to brag about not needing sleep...
